projects.name: Lift and Pedestrian Walkway System between Lai King Hill Road and Lai Cho Road, Kwai Chung

page_title.en: Lift and Pedestrian Walkway System between Lai King Hill Road and Lai Cho Road, Kwai Chung
page_title.tc: 葵涌荔景山路至麗祖路的升降機及行人通道系統

description.en: The proposed "Lift and Pedestrian Walkway System between Lai King Hill Road and Lai Cho Road, Kwai Chung" is a "Hillside Escalator Link and Elevator System". The Project aims to provide a safe, comfortable and convenient pedestrian link between Lai King Hill Road and Lai Cho Road, Kwai Chung.
description.tc: 擬建的「葵涌荔景山路至麗祖路的升降機及行人通道系統」屬於「上坡地區自動扶梯連接系統」，項目旨在於葵涌荔景山路和麗祖路之間提供一條既安全又舒適方便的行人通道。

photos.alt: Lift and Pedestrian Walkway System between Lai King Hill Road and Lai Cho Road, Kwai Chung

Wah Sing Street to Castle Peak Road – Kwai Chung
Escalator Link System
page_title.tc: 華星街至青山公路–葵涌段自動扶梯系統

description.en: The proposed Project aims to provide a safe, comfortable and convenient pedestrian link between Wah Sing Street and Castle Peak Road – Kwai Chung.
description.tc: 擬建項目旨在於華星街至青山公路–葵涌段之間提供一條既安全又舒適方便的行人通道。

Wah Sing Street to Castle Peak Road – Kwai Chung

projects.name: Pedestrian Link near Chuk Yuen North Estate

page_title.en: Pedestrian Link near Chuk Yuen North Estate
page_title.tc: 竹園北邨行人通道系統

description.en: The proposed "Pedestrian Link near Chuk Yuen North Estate" is a "Hillside Escalator Link and Elevator System".  The Project aims to provide a convenient and comfortable walking environment between Chuk Yuen (North) Estate and Wong Tai Sin Road in Wong Tai Sin.
description.tc: 擬建的「竹園北邨行人通道系統」屬於「上坡地區自動扶梯連接系統」，項目旨在於黃大仙竹園北邨和黃大仙道之間提供便捷和舒適的步行環境。

photos.alt: Pedestrian Link near Chuk Yuen North Estate

projects.name: Lift and Pedestrian Walkway System between Lau Sin Street and Tin Hau Temple Road

page_title.en: Lift and Pedestrian Walkway System between Lau Sin Street and Tin Hau Temple Road
page_title.tc: 留仙街至天后廟道升降機及行人通道系統

description.en: The proposed "Lift and Pedestrian Walkway System between Lau Sin Street and Tin Hau Temple Road" is a "Hillside Escalator Link and Elevator System". The Project aims to provide a convenient and comfortable pedestrian link between Tin Hau Temple Road and MTR Tin Hau Station as well as the public transport interchange at King's Road, and to serve as a safe and barrier-free access for the elderly and the disabled.
description.tc: 擬建的「留仙街至天后廟道升降機及行人通道系統」屬於「上坡地區自動扶梯連接系統」，項目旨在提供便利舒適的行人通道，連接天后廟道與港鐵天后站和位於英皇道的公共運輸交匯處，並為長者和殘疾人士提供安全的無障礙通道。

photos.alt: Lift and Pedestrian Walkway System between Lau Sin Street and Tin Hau Temple Road

projects.name: HY/2021/04 Braemar Hill Pedestrian Link

page_title.en: Braemar Hill Pedestrian Link
page_title.tc: 寶馬山行人通道系統

description.en: The proposed “Braemar Hill Pedestrian Link” is a “Hillside Escalator Link and Elevator System” with the purpose of facilitating pedestrians travelling to and from uphill areas. By taking pedestrians as a priority, the project will mainly serve the residents in the district, and provide a safe, comfortable and convenient route for pedestrians to and from areas with steep terrain.
description.tc: 擬建的「寶馬山行人通道系統」屬於「上坡地區自動扶梯連接系統」，目的是方便市民往來上坡地區 ，並以行人為優先考慮的工程項目，主要受惠的行人是往返該區的市民，行人通道系統能為他們提供一條安全，舒適及便捷的行人路線，方便他們往返地勢陡斜的地區，提供乘車以外的另一選擇。

HY/2023/07 Pedestrian Walkway System between Hing Shing Road and Tai Wo Hau Road and Provision of Covers on Walkways near Hong Kong Eye Hospital, Tuen Mun Hospital and Tang Shiu Kin Hospital

page_title.en: Pedestrian Walkway System between Hing Shing Road and Tai Wo Hau Road and Provision of Covers on Walkways near Hong Kong Eye Hospital, Tuen Mun Hospital and Tang Shiu Kin Hospital
page_title.tc: 興盛路至大窩口道行人通道系統及連接香港眼科醫院、屯門醫院和鄧肇堅醫院的行人通道加建上蓋

description.en: This Project aims to provide a comfortable and convenient pedestrian link between Hing Shing Road and Tai Wo Hau Road and covers to walkways connecting the hospitals to public transport facilities nearby for enhancing the walking environment for peoples travelling to and from the hospitals.
description.tc: 此項目旨在於興盛路和大窩口道之間提供一條既舒適又方便的行人通道及為連接公立醫院及鄰近公共交通設施的行人通道加設上蓋，為往返醫院的行人改善步行環境。

description.tc: 項目旨在為連接公立醫院/診所及鄰近公共交通設施的行人通道加設上蓋，為往返公立醫院/診所的行人改善步行環境。

Elevated Pedestrian Corridor in Yuen Long Town connecting with Long Ping Station

page_title.en: Elevated Pedestrian Corridor in Yuen Long Town connecting with Long Ping Station
page_title.tc: 連接朗屏站的元朗市高架行人通道

description.en: To relieve the prevailing pedestrian congestion on at grade footpaths and to meet the anticipated pedestrian traffic demand to be induced by the future developments in the Yuen Long town area.
description.tc: 工程旨在紓緩目前元朗市地面行人路的行人擠塞狀況，以及應付預期元朗市未來發展所帶來的行人交通需求。

consultant.en: Ove Arup & Partners Hong Kong Ltd

projects.name: Pedestrian Link between MTR City One Station and Prince of Wales Hospital

page_title.en: Pedestrian Link between MTR City One Station and Prince of Wales Hospital
page_title.tc: 港鐵第一城站至威爾斯親王醫院行人通道系統

description.en: The project aims to provide a comfortable, convenient and barrier-free elevated pedestrian walkway system to facilitate pedestrians, the elderly, person with disabilities and frail patients to travel between the MTR City One Station and the Prince of Wales Hospital. The project mainly inludes construction of a covered elevated pedestrian walkway connecting the existing Footbridge No. NF414 outside MTR City One Station Exit B and the Main Clinical Block and Trauma Centre (MCBTC) of the Prince of Wales Hospital at Level 1.
description.tc: 工程項目旨在提供一條舒適、便捷及無障礙的高架行人通道系統，以便利行人、長者、殘疾人士及體弱病人來往港鐵第一城站及威爾斯親王醫院。 項目主要興建一條高架行人通道以連接近港鐵第一城站B出口外的現有行人天橋編號NF414與威爾斯親王醫院住院主樓暨創傷中心一樓。

projects.name: Proposed Pedestrian Footbridge System in Mong Kok

page_title.en: Proposed Pedestrian Footbridge System in Mong Kok
page_title.tc: 建議的旺角行人天橋系統

description.en: The  proposed footbridge system aims to improve the  crowded footpaths in the district, the pedestrian environment, the connectivity  of the walkway system in the central district of Mong Kok and the  vehicle-pedestrian conflicts as well as the pedestrian safety.
description.tc: 建議的行人天橋系統旨在紓緩區內行人路的擠迫情況、改善行人環境、加強旺角中心區行人通道的連接性、減少人車爭路及改善行人安全。

projects.name: Extension of Footbridge Network in Tsuen Wan – Footbridge B along Tai Chung Road and Hoi Shing Road

page_title.en: Extension of Footbridge Network in Tsuen Wan – Footbridge B along Tai Chung Road and Hoi Shing Road
page_title.tc: 荃灣行人天橋網絡擴建工程 - 沿大涌道及海盛路的行人天橋B

description.en: This project aims to provide a footbridge system along Tai Chung Road and Hoi Shing Road to extend the footbridge network in the western part of Tsuen Wan town centre by connecting the existing footbridges.
description.tc: 本項目建議沿大涌道及海盛路提供行人天橋連接現有的行人天橋系統，藉此延伸行人天橋網絡覆蓋荃灣市中心西面地區。

projects.name: Footbridge near Former Ngau Tau Kok Police Station and Associated Road Works

page_title.en: Footbridge near Former Ngau Tau Kok Police Station and Associated Road Works
page_title.tc: 近前牛頭角警署的行人天橋及相關道路工程

description.en: The proposed road works are to provide a new footbridge across Wai Yip Street near Siu Yip Street and widen a section of Siu Yip Street footpath to alleviate the overcrowded situation at the existing footbridge extended from the podium of Telford Plaza across Wai Yip Street near Sheung Yuet Road, and enhance the pedestrian connectivity between MTR Kowloon Bay Station and the future Kowloon Bay Action Area.
description.tc: 進行建議的道路工程，旨在在兆業街附近建造一條橫跨偉業街的新行人天橋，並擴闊兆業街的一段行人路，從而紓緩德福廣場近常悅道的平台延伸至橫跨偉業街的現有行人天橋的擁擠情況，並加強港鐵九龍灣站與未來九龍灣行動區的行人連繫設施。

photos.alt: Layout Plan of Footbridge near Former Ngau Tau Kok Police Station and Associated Road Works

projects.name: Proposed Pedestrian Environment Improvement Works in Kwun Tong Business Area – Ngau Tau Kok Portion

page_title.en: Proposed Pedestrian Environment Improvement Works in Kwun Tong Business Area – Ngau Tau Kok Portion
page_title.tc: 擬議觀塘商貿區的行人環境改善工程 - 牛頭角範圍

description.en: The proposed road works are to enhance the connectivity, walkability and environment of pedestrian links to MTR Ngau Tau Kok Station for facilitating the transformation of Kowloon East into another core business district. The proposed road works includes the construction of a pedestrian subway for crossing Elegance Road and Kwun Tong Road, with lift and staircase provisions.
description.tc: 建議的道路工程，旨在改善港鐵牛頭角站行人連接通道的連繫、易行度和行人環境，以配合九龍東轉型為另一個核心商業區。建議的道路工程，包括加建一條橫跨觀塘道及雅麗道的行人隧道，並設有升降機及樓梯。

photos.alt: Layout Plan of Proposed Pedestrian Environment Improvement Works in Kwun Tong Business Area – Ngau Tau Kok Portion

Walkway Cover near Tuen Mun Hospital

page_title.en: Walkway Cover near Tuen Mun Hospital
page_title.tc: 連接屯門醫院的行人通道加建上蓋

description.en: The objective of the proposed works is to enhance the walking environment for people travelling to and from the Tuen Mun Hospital. The works mainly comprise of the construction of a walkway cover at Tsing Lun Road near Tuen Mun Hospital and associated civil works, electrical and mechanical works, drainage works and lighting works.
description.tc: 此項目旨為往返屯門醫院的行人改善步行環境。工程主要包括於屯門醫院附近的青麟路加建行人通道上蓋及相關的土木工程、機電工程、渠務工程和照明工程。

photos.alt: Walkway Cover near Tuen Mun Hospital

projects.name: Walkway Cover near Tang Shiu Kin Hospital

page_title.en: Walkway Cover near Tang Shiu Kin Hospital
page_title.tc: 連接鄧肇堅醫院的行人通道加建上蓋

description.en: The objective of the proposed works is to enhance the walking environment for people travelling to and from the Tang Shiu Kin Hospital. The works mainly comprise of the construction of a walkway cover at Queen’s Road East near Tang Shiu Kin Hospital and associated civil works, electrical and mechanical works, drainage works and lighting works.
description.tc: 此項目旨為往返鄧肇堅醫院的行人改善步行環境。工程主要包括於鄰近鄧肇堅醫院的皇后大道東加建行人通道上蓋及相關的土木工程、機電工程、渠務工程和照明工程。

photos.alt: Walkway Cover near Tang Shiu Kin Hospital

projects.name: Walkway cover near Hong Kong Eye Hospital
Expansion of Bus-Bus Interchange at Tate's Cairn Tunnel

page_title.en: Expansion of Bus-Bus Interchange at Tate's Cairn Tunnel
page_title.tc: 擴建大老山隧道巴士轉乘站

description.en: This project aims at utilising part of the freed-up space after implementation of the HKeToll for expanding the bus-bus interchange at Tate's Cairn Tunnel, in order to provide additional bus lay-bys and passenger shelters to benefit the traveling public between the New Territories and Kowloon.
description.tc: 本項目旨在利用實施「易通行」後騰出的空置土地作擴建大老山巴士轉乘站，增設額外巴士停車灣並興建候車上蓋，以便利往來新界和九龍各區的乘客。

photos.alt: Layout Plan of Expansion of Bus-Bus Interchange at Tate's Cairn Tunnel

projects.name: Footbridge connecting Morse Park No.3 and No.4, Wong Tai Sin
Footbridge across Tsui Ping Road

page_title.en: Footbridge across Tsui Ping Road
page_title.tc: 橫跨翠屏道的行人天橋

description.en: The objective of the proposed works is to construct a footbridge across Tsui Ping Road connecting the existing footbridge No. KF90 and the elevated pedestrian deck under PWP Item No. 3193GK Kwun Tong Composite Development.
description.tc: 工程旨在興建一條橫跨翠屏道的行人天橋，連接現有行人天橋編號KF90和工務計劃項目第3193GK號觀塘綜合發展項目下擬建的高架行人平台。

projects.name: Construction of Proposed Bus-Bus Interchange at Aberdeen Tunnel

page_title.en: Construction of Proposed Bus-Bus Interchange at Aberdeen Tunnel
page_title.tc: 香港仔隧道巴士轉乘站

description.en: After the implementation of "HKeToll" at the Aberdeen Tunnel, the existing toll booths were demolished and the land released from the toll plaza area to construct a bus interchange.  This project mainly involves the provision of walkway covers at the proposed bus interchange and associated civil, including drainage, underground utilities, electrical and mechanical installations, landscaping, traffic ancillary facilities and slope works, so as to provide an all-weather and comfortable walkway and waiting area.
description.tc: 香港仔隧道實施「易通行」後，收費廣場的收費亭被拆除後所騰出的土地將用以興建巴士轉乘站。有關工程將主要在擬建巴士轉乘站加設行人通道上蓋以及進行附屬工程，包括渠務、地下管綫、機電設備、園景美化、交通輔助設施及斜坡工程等，以提供全天候及舒適的通道及候車空間。
